findings.summary: Core status documents were stale against the current Phase 5 state.
Documentation understated current verified adapter and review-rule coverage.

evidence.derivative_review_rule: 3102* subjects are exported as review items

findings.summary: Workbook artifact keeps the legacy name phase3_outputs.xlsx under output_phase5/.
No documentation-specific governance config exists under pricing_parser/config.
No docs_readable/ derivative layer exists, so no dual-layer conflict was detected.

fixes_applied: Updated docs/status.md to current run statistics
Updated docs/HANDOFF.md to Phase 5 handoff state
Updated MIGRATION_PLAN.md to Phase 5 baseline and next-step planning
Added markdown and JSON governance reports under docs/
residual_risks: Workbook filename migration may break downstream consumers if changed without compatibility handling.
Additional asset classes may still expose review-rule gaps beyond the current fixture set.
Documentation may drift again if status documents are not refreshed after each bounded delivery.
